Initializer# init(configuration:delegate:)

Mac Catalyst 18.2+macOS 15.0+

```
init(
    configuration recordingOutputConfiguration: SCRecordingOutputConfiguration,
    delegate: any SCRecordingOutputDelegate
)
```
